message.content:
@startuml
title Loading Team page (no refresh)

participant TeamLive
participant Team
participant Backlog
participant Persistence

TeamLive -> Team : backlog(team_id, refresh: false)
Team -> Backlog : get(team)
Backlog -> Persistence : get_backlog(team_id)
Persistence --> Backlog : [%Story{}, %Story{}]
Backlog --> Team : [%Story{}, %Story{}]
Team --> TeamLive : [%Story{}, %Story{}]

@enduml
